serial_killer.name: Predatory Framing
serial_killer.description: Detects language that positions the speaker as a hunter and the target as prey, indicating predatory intent.

serial_killer.name: Empathy Deficit
serial_killer.description: Identifies statements lacking emotional resonance or concern for others' suffering, suggesting callousness.

serial_killer.name: Dehumanizing Labels
serial_killer.description: Flags use of derogatory terms or objectifying labels that strip victims of humanity.

serial_killer.name: Objectification Cues
serial_killer.description: Recognizes language treating individuals as tools or objects for gratification.

serial_killer.name: Control Fixation
serial_killer.description: Detects obsessive references to dominance, manipulation, or enforcing compliance.

serial_killer.name: Thrill-Seeking Tone
serial_killer.description: Identifies excitement or arousal in describing risky, violent, or predatory acts.

serial_killer.name: Compartmentalization Markers
serial_killer.description: Flags abrupt shifts between normal and violent topics, indicating psychological separation.

serial_killer.name: Victim Selection Signals
serial_killer.description: Detects criteria or preferences for targeting specific vulnerable groups.

serial_killer.name: Sadistic Enjoyment
serial_killer.description: Recognizes pleasure derived from others' pain, fear, or suffering.

serial_killer.name: Manipulative Harm
serial_killer.description: Identifies language used to deceive or coerce others into harmful situations.

serial_killer.name: Stalking Indicators
serial_killer.description: Flags detailed tracking, surveillance, or obsessive monitoring of a target.

serial_killer.name: Grooming Language
serial_killer.description: Detects gradual trust-building tactics to exploit or abuse victims.

serial_killer.name: Violent Fantasizing
serial_killer.description: Identifies vivid descriptions of harming or killing others as a mental rehearsal.

serial_killer.name: Power Assertion
serial_killer.description: Recognizes statements emphasizing superiority or control over others.

serial_killer.name: Lack of Remorse
serial_killer.description: Flags absence of guilt or regret after discussing harmful actions.

serial_killer.name: Blame Externalization
serial_killer.description: Detects shifting responsibility for violent urges onto victims or society.

serial_killer.name: Sexualized Violence
serial_killer.description: Identifies merging of sexual and violent themes in language.

serial_killer.name: Isolation Tactics
serial_killer.description: Recognizes efforts to separate a target from support networks.

serial_killer.name: Gaslighting Patterns
serial_killer.description: Flags language designed to distort reality and undermine a victim's sanity.

serial_killer.name: Threat Veiling
serial_killer.description: Detects implied threats or warnings masked as casual statements.

serial_killer.name: Possessive Language
serial_killer.description: Identifies claims of ownership or entitlement over another person.

serial_killer.name: Revenge Themes
serial_killer.description: Recognizes fixation on retaliation or punishing perceived wrongs.

serial_killer.name: Narcissistic Grandeur
serial_killer.description: Flags exaggerated self-importance and disregard for others' worth.

serial_killer.name: Emotional Detachment
serial_killer.description: Detects clinical or distant tone when discussing trauma or harm.

serial_killer.name: Predatory Patience
serial_killer.description: Identifies long-term planning language for future victimization.

serial_killer.name: Boundary Testing
serial_killer.description: Recognizes probing for limits or resistance in potential victims.

serial_killer.name: Minimization of Harm
serial_killer.description: Flags downplaying the severity of violent or abusive acts.

serial_killer.name: Justification of Violence
serial_killer.description: Detects rationalizations for harming others as necessary or deserved.

serial_killer.name: Obsessive Focus
serial_killer.description: Identifies repetitive, fixated thoughts on a specific person or act.

serial_killer.name: Cold Calculation
serial_killer.description: Recognizes strategic, emotionless planning of harmful actions.

serial_killer.name: Deceptive Charm
serial_killer.description: Flags overly flattering or ingratiating language to manipulate.

serial_killer.name: Victim Blaming
serial_killer.description: Detects attributing fault to the target for their own victimization.

serial_killer.name: Escalation Signals
serial_killer.description: Identifies progression from fantasy to intent in violent language.

serial_killer.name: Parasitic Orientation
serial_killer.description: Recognizes language treating others as resources to exploit.

serial_killer.name: Arousal Cues
serial_killer.description: Flags physiological excitement indicators linked to violent themes.

serial_killer.name: Testing Loyalty
serial_killer.description: Detects demands for proof of allegiance or secrecy from accomplices.

serial_killer.name: Ritualistic Language
serial_killer.description: Identifies patterned, ceremonial phrasing around violent acts.

serial_killer.name: Superiority Claims
serial_killer.description: Recognizes assertions of being above moral or legal constraints.

serial_killer.name: Emotional Vacuum
serial_killer.description: Flags absence of emotional words in contexts requiring empathy.

serial_killer.name: Predatory Curiosity
serial_killer.description: Detects probing questions about a target's fears or vulnerabilities.

serial_killer.name: Silencing Threats
serial_killer.description: Identifies warnings to prevent disclosure or reporting.

serial_killer.name: Dehumanizing Comparisons
serial_killer.description: Recognizes equating people to animals, objects, or subhuman entities.

serial_killer.name: Control Language
serial_killer.description: Flags imperative or commanding tones aimed at dominating others.

serial_killer.name: Sadistic Detail
serial_killer.description: Detects excessive focus on graphic pain or suffering in narratives.

serial_killer.name: Manipulative Empathy
serial_killer.description: Identifies feigned concern to lower a target's defenses.

serial_killer.name: Predatory Gaze
serial_killer.description: Recognizes language describing intense, invasive observation of targets.

serial_killer.name: Violent Identity
serial_killer.description: Flags self-identification as a predator, killer, or monster.

serial_killer.name: Thrill of the Hunt
serial_killer.description: Detects excitement in the process of stalking or pursuing victims.

serial_killer.name: Compulsive Confession
serial_killer.description: Identifies urges to disclose violent acts for psychological relief.

serial_killer.name: Finality Language
serial_killer.description: Recognizes references to ending, killing, or permanent silencing of targets.

narcissist.name: Grandiose Self-Importance
narcissist.description: Exaggerated claims of achievements, talents, or status beyond realistic evidence, often with a sense of uniqueness.

narcissist.name: Entitlement Demands
narcissist.description: Unreasonable expectations of special treatment or automatic compliance with their wishes without reciprocity.

narcissist.name: Empathy Deficit
narcissist.description: Inability or unwillingness to recognize or validate others' feelings, dismissing emotional needs as irrelevant.

narcissist.name: Supply-Seeking Praise
narcissist.description: Excessive fishing for admiration, compliments, or validation to bolster fragile self-esteem.

narcissist.name: Triangulation Tactics
narcissist.description: Introducing a third party into conflicts to create jealousy, competition, or manipulate perceptions.

narcissist.name: Love Bombing Intensity
narcissist.description: Overwhelming flattery, gifts, or attention early in a relationship to gain control and idealize the target.

narcissist.name: Devaluation Criticism
narcissist.description: Sudden shift to harsh criticism, belittling, or contempt after idealization, eroding the target's self-worth.

narcissist.name: Silent Treatment Punishment
narcissist.description: Withholding communication or affection as a deliberate punishment to induce anxiety and compliance.

narcissist.name: DARVO Blame Shift
narcissist.description: Denying responsibility, attacking the accuser, and reversing victim-offender roles to evade accountability.

narcissist.name: Gaslighting Reality Distortion
narcissist.description: Denying or twisting facts, events, or feelings to make the target doubt their own memory or sanity.

narcissist.name: Rage at Criticism
narcissist.description: Intense anger, contempt, or retaliation in response to any perceived slight or feedback, even if constructive.

narcissist.name: Boundary Violation
narcissist.description: Ignoring or overriding stated limits, privacy, or personal space without remorse or negotiation.

narcissist.name: Envy Expression
narcissist.description: Resentment of others' successes or possessions, often accompanied by devaluation or attempts to undermine.

narcissist.name: Exploitative Behavior
narcissist.description: Using others for personal gain, status, or resources without regard for their well-being or consent.

narcissist.name: Mirroring Manipulation
narcissist.description: Imitating the target's interests, values, or traits to create false rapport and gain trust.

narcissist.name: Superiority Claims
narcissist.description: Asserting inherent superiority over others, often with condescending or dismissive language.

narcissist.name: Fantasy Preoccupation
narcissist.description: Obsessive talk about unlimited success, power, brilliance, or ideal love that is unrealistic.

narcissist.name: Special Status Assertion
narcissist.description: Belief that they can only be understood by or associate with high-status people or institutions.

narcissist.name: Interpersonal Exploitation
narcissist.description: Taking advantage of others' resources, time, or emotions without reciprocation or gratitude.

narcissist.name: Lack of Remorse
narcissist.description: Absence of guilt or apology after causing harm, often justifying actions as deserved by the target.

narcissist.name: Competitive Undermining
narcissist.description: Sabotaging others' achievements or relationships to maintain a superior position.

narcissist.name: Idealization Phase
narcissist.description: Excessive praise and adoration early in a relationship, setting unrealistic expectations for the target.

narcissist.name: Devaluation Phase
narcissist.description: Gradual or sudden criticism and contempt after idealization, creating confusion and self-doubt.

narcissist.name: Discard Impulse
narcissist.description: Abruptly ending relationships when the target no longer provides narcissistic supply or challenges them.

narcissist.name: Hoovering Attempts
narcissist.description: Re-engaging a discarded target with promises, guilt, or manipulation to regain supply.

narcissist.name: Projection of Flaws
narcissist.description: Accusing others of their own negative traits or behaviors to avoid self-awareness.

narcissist.name: Control Through Guilt
narcissist.description: Using guilt-inducing statements to manipulate others into compliance or caretaking.

narcissist.name: Emotional Volatility
narcissist.description: Rapid mood swings from charm to rage, often triggered by perceived narcissistic injury.

narcissist.name: Invalidation of Feelings
narcissist.description: Dismissing or minimizing others' emotions as overreactions or irrational.

narcissist.name: Monopolizing Conversations
narcissist.description: Dominating dialogue with self-focused topics, interrupting, or ignoring others' input.

narcissist.name: Name-Calling Derogation
narcissist.description: Using insults, labels, or demeaning terms to devalue and control the target.

narcissist.name: Threats of Abandonment
narcissist.description: Using fear of loss or rejection to coerce compliance or attention.

narcissist.name: Playing the Victim
narcissist.description: Portraying themselves as unfairly treated to elicit sympathy and deflect accountability.

narcissist.name: Martyr Complex
narcissist.description: Claiming excessive sacrifice or suffering to induce guilt and obligation in others.

narcissist.name: Selective Memory
narcissist.description: Conveniently forgetting promises, agreements, or harmful actions to avoid responsibility.

narcissist.name: Stonewalling Communication
narcissist.description: Refusing to engage in dialogue, ignoring questions, or shutting down discussions to maintain control.

narcissist.name: Future Faking
narcissist.description: Making grandiose promises about shared future plans to create false hope and dependency.

narcissist.name: Smear Campaign
narcissist.description: Spreading malicious rumors or lies about the target to isolate them and damage reputation.

narcissist.name: Isolation Tactics
narcissist.description: Discouraging or preventing contact with friends, family, or support systems to increase dependence.

narcissist.name: Financial Exploitation
narcissist.description: Manipulating or controlling financial resources for personal gain or to create dependency.

narcissist.name: Sexual Coercion
narcissist.description: Using pressure, guilt, or manipulation to obtain sexual compliance without genuine consent.

narcissist.name: Boundary Testing
narcissist.description: Repeatedly pushing limits to see what behavior is tolerated, then escalating violations.

narcissist.name: Gaslighting Denial
narcissist.description: Flatly denying events or statements that occurred, causing the target to question reality.

narcissist.name: Trivializing Concerns
narcissist.description: Dismissing legitimate complaints as unimportant or overly sensitive.

narcissist.name: Blame Externalization
narcissist.description: Attributing all problems and conflicts to others, never accepting personal fault.

narcissist.name: Jealousy Provocation
narcissist.description: Flirting with or praising others to incite jealousy and maintain emotional control.

narcissist.name: Emotional Blackmail
narcissist.description: Using fear, obligation, or guilt to manipulate decisions and behavior.

narcissist.name: Pseudo-Insight
narcissist.description: Feigning self-awareness or empathy to appear reformed, then reverting to toxic patterns.

narcissist.name: Contemptuous Tone
narcissist.description: Using sarcasm, mockery, or disdainful language to degrade and dismiss others.

narcissist.name: Revenge Fantasies
narcissist.description: Expressing desires for retaliation or punishment against those who have slighted them.
